description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New

Mark as Unread shows an empty blue circle instead of a “1” so you know there’s no new messages

Fixed & Improved

Audio should no longer mysteriously be muted

Truncated links don’t point to the wrong location

All Signal chats should now allow voice messages

Tweaked how chats move between Inbox, Low Priority, and Archive to be more intuitive
